title: pourthiaea amphidoxa var. amphileia
intro: Pourthiaea amphidoxa var. amphileia, also known as Chinese silvervine or 'silver vine', is a type of flowering vine native to Asia, belonging to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pourthiaea amphidoxa var. amphileia include relief from anxiety and stress due to its pheromone, known as nepetalactone, which has a calming effect on cats. Herbal preparations of Pourthiaea amphidoxa var. amphileia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
